risk_if_not_implemented: Without Practical Exercises, residual security, compliance, or resilience risk may accumulate, potentially leading to control failures or non-compliance.

compensating_control_1.name: Security, Compliance & Resilience Training Records
compensating_control_1.description:
Mechanisms exist to document, retain and monitor individual training activities, including:
(1) Initial security, compliance and resilience awareness training;
(2) Recurring awareness training; and
(3) Technology Assets, Applications and/or Services (TAAS)-specific training.
compensating_control_1.justification: Security, Compliance & Resilience Training Records (SAT-04) provides personnel training and awareness that compensates for the absence of Practical Exercises (SAT-03.1) by reducing human-factor risk by equipping personnel to recognize and respond to relevant threats. Given the people-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Security, Compliance & Resilience Awareness Training
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to provide all employees and contractors appropriate security, compliance and resilience awareness education and training that is relevant for their job function.
compensating_control_2.justification: Security, Compliance & Resilience Awareness Training (SAT-02) provides personnel training and awareness that compensates for the absence of Practical Exercises (SAT-03.1) by reducing human-factor risk by equipping personnel to recognize and respond to relevant threats. Given the people-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
